name: langchain-insumer
summary: LangChain tools for InsumerAPI — on-chain verification, wallet trust profiles (36 checks: USDC and USDT across 20 chains, governance, NFTs, staking), EAS attestations, Gitcoin Passport, Farcaster ID, compliance templates, ACP/UCP commerce protocol integration, domain verification, merchant onboarding, and credit management across 32 blockchains. ECDSA-signed booleans, optional Merkle proofs, 26 tools. Used by DJD Agent Score (Coinbase x402).
